title: Kam Keiser
compiled_truth: Kam Keiser is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-17 to 2002-02-13), Kam Keiser sent 464 and received 1415 emails, totalling 1879 interactions.
